qualifications.niche: 4C natural hair treatment testing + occasion styling
qualifications.narrative: Your data reads like someone who studies 4C hair, not someone who just likes pretty results. You have watched 22,429 videos overall, liked 6,000, favorited 3,585, followed 2,349 accounts, and made 1,311 searches. Then the niche-specific pattern gets even clearer: you searched cecred 8 times, cecred tutorial 4 times, and how to apply heat with cecred deep conditioner 4 times. That is technique research. That is product testing curiosity. That is somebody trying to understand what actually works on real hair, not just what looks good in a 20-second clip. Most creators posting in this space have not done that much homework before they ever hit record. You already have the research base to talk about treatments, styling decisions, and what is worth trying versus what is just marketed well.
stats: Cecred searched 8x; cecred tutorial 4x; how to apply heat with cecred deep conditioner 4x

ideas.title: The Cécred + Oud Wash-Day Rule
ideas.hook: If you have 4C hair and you love oud, the biggest Cécred wash-day mistake is making your deep conditioner fight your fragrance before you even leave the house.
ideas.niche: 4C natural hair testing x Cécred/Beyoncé-adjacent commentary x oud layering

ideas.title: Heat vs No Heat With Cécred for a Bakhoor Night
ideas.hook: I used Cécred deep conditioner with heat on one side of my 4C hair and no heat on the other, and the real winner was the side that still worked with amber bakhoor by the end of the night.
ideas.format: Split-screen mini experiment with quick reveal, 60-90 seconds
ideas.niche: 4C treatment testing x Cécred tutorial search intent x bakhoor styling

schedule.rationale: Your peak consumption is Wednesday, Friday, Monday, around 3am, 4am, 9pm. 21% of your watching happens in these windows. Your demographic likely shares your rhythm. Post 2-3 hours before these peaks for maximum reach.
